consensus_score.reasoning: GPT-4o detected completion through suture_cut phase at 150 seconds while Claude estimated 300 seconds without clear completion visibility. GPT-4o reported adequate slit closure while Claude identified a visible gap. Given GPT-4o's detection of the suture_cut phase and more detailed completion assessment, the earlier completion time and no-penalty assessment is carried forward, though confidence remains moderate due to the disagreement on slit closure.

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o detected the suture_cut phase which Claude did not observe, indicating more complete task visibility and earlier actual completion.

claude_value.description: The final frames show a visible residual slit gap in the Penrose drain that remains open despite the completed suture and knot.

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o reported adequate slit closure and detected task completion through suture cutting, suggesting the slit assessment was made at the proper completion point rather than mid-procedure.

disagreements.resolution: Used GPT-4o's phase list including suture_cut
disagreements.rationale: The suture_cut phase is required for task completion and GPT-4o's detection of this phase supports the earlier completion time.
